channel.title: K10Blog
channel.description: Curated essays on filmmaking, storytelling, editing philosophy, and production systems.

item.title: Cosmic Dinner Recipes & Creative Process Insights
item.description: Shared new Cosmic Dinner recipes, creative ideas, and updates on K10's artistic journey.

item.title: Cosmic Dinner Recipes & Creative Process Insights
item.description: Exploring new Cosmic Dinner recipes, creative ideas, and the art of storytelling through food and film.

item.title: Cosmic Dinner Recipes & Creative Process Insights
item.description: Exploring new Cosmic Dinner recipes and the creative mind behind them.

item.title: How AI Routines Save My Creative Chaos
item.description: Learn 4 daily AI routines to cut through creative chaos and keep your workflow steady.

item.title: Your Content Pipeline Is Stuck: Automate These 4 Daily AI Routines for Unstoppable Output
item.description: K10 reveals the recurring AI-driven workflows that keep content creation flowing smoothly from idea to publication without manual bottlenecks.

item.title: Your AI Workflow Is a House of Cards: Build These 3 Skills for Unshakable Reliability
item.description: K10 recounts the breaking point with fragile prompts and how building custom skills restored consistency, reduced errors, and reclaimed creative focus.

item.title: Your Creative Workflow Is Broken: Fix These 3 Daily AI Habits Instantly
item.description: K10 shares daily AI tools, no-code tips, and real-world fixes for creators stuck between ideas and execution.

item.title: The No-Code Creator's AI Stack: Simple Tools That Won't Break Your Flow
item.description: Learn how to balance creativity and productivity with K10's daily workflow tips and no-code tools for creators.

item.title: From AI Chaos to Creative Control: The 3 Daily Routines That Actually Work
item.description: Learn how K10 uses AI tools and daily routines to streamline creative work and keep projects moving smoothly.

item.title: Your Content Command Center: 4 Daily AI Routines That Eliminate Chaos
item.description: The day-to-day operating loop we use to turn scattered AI use into a dependable content and marketing command center.

item.title: OpenRouter Meets OpenClaw: The No-Code Playbook for AI-Powered Creators
item.description: A practical, non-technical guide to connecting OpenRouter to OpenClaw so you can run better models, route tasks smarter, and build a reliable AI workflow.

item.title: Stop Writing Prompts: Build Skills Instead (The AI Reliability Blueprint)
item.description: A practical guide for creators and marketers on turning inconsistent AI chats into repeatable, reliable workflows using skills and routing.

item.title: The Friday Reckoning: How Weekly Reviews Keep My AI Workflow from Becoming a House of Cards
item.description: K10 explains the non-negotiable Friday ritual that catches drift, prevents technical debt, and ensures the AI systems stay aligned with actual business needs.

item.title: The Trust Curve: When to Delegate to AI vs. When to Keep It Close
item.description: K10 shares the personal rubric for deciding which parts of the creative workflow to automate and which to keep firmly in human hands — with real examples from a typical workday.

item.title: Replacing the Tool Graveyard: How I Finally Stopped Chasing the 'Next Best Thing'
item.description: K10's journey from tool hoarding to skill mastery — and why focusing on core competencies beats collecting shiny AI toys.

item.title: The Validation Dilemma: How Much Human Oversight Is Too Much (or Too Little)?
item.description: K10 explores the Goldilocks zone of AI workflow validation — finding the right balance between full automation and manual review, with real examples from the lead pipeline.

item.title: From Manual Copy-Paste to Autonomous Intake: Building the Lead Pipeline That Runs Itself
item.description: A deep-dive into how K10 transformed a tedious manual intake process into a fully automated, validated, and monitored lead pipeline using skills and schemas.

item.title: The Quiet Power of Daily Show-Ups: Why Consistency Beats Brilliance in AI Workflows
item.description: K10 reflects on the transformative effect of showing up every day with simple, repeatable AI routines — and why 'boring' workflows win over 'clever' ones every time.

item.title: Your AI Assistant Is Lying to You: How I Discovered the Gap Between Promise and Reality
item.description: K10 shares a candid reflection on the disconnect between AI marketing hype and the messy reality of daily workflow integration, plus practical strategies for bridging that gap.

item.title: The Quiet Side of Creativity: Why Your Best Work Happens When You Stop Rushing
item.description: Today's update: refining creative processes, organizing notes, and staying curious without rushing projects.

item.title: Creative Spring Cleaning: How to Organize Your Mind Without Killing Momentum
item.description: K10 is refining creative processes and organizing ideas. No new releases, but progress is happening behind the scenes.

item.title: Progress, Not Perfection: How to Ship When You're Still Figuring It Out
item.description: Today’s update: No new releases, but deepening the creative process and nurturing ideas behind the scenes.

item.title: Process Over Product: The Slow Creative's Guide to Real Progress
item.description: Today’s focus: sharpening the creative process without rushing. Ideas simmer, not shipped. A creator’s honest update.

item.title: The Unseen Work: Why Your Best Ideas Need Time to Marinate
item.description: What K10 is working on, thinking about, and putting out into the world.
